title: X3 - Pixel Realism 64x
body:
### Visual Style
X3 is the spiritual successor of such packs as R3D craft. 
The visual style is based on simple pixel textures with the addition of glowing elements, soft shadows and material textures. It has vanilla-like colors and clean appearance, everything you need for long play sessions.

### Features
- All blocks and entities covered
- Texture variations
- Custom leaves models

### Planned features
- PBR Support
- Other resolutions
- More custom models

This pack is available on **[Minecraft Marketplace](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/in-mine/x3----pixel-realism/c3d5b917-751b-4061-b0cc-605996f1ea48)** as a mash-up with renewed world generation, animated plants, 3d tools, custom VFX and much more!

### **PBR support preview** 
(Frames caught in Minecraft Bedrock Edition using Vibrant Visuals)

![X3 PBR Preview](https://i.imgur.com/i4YYFVs.png)
![X3 PBR Preview](https://i.imgur.com/JsFZS93.png)
![X3 PBR Preview](https://i.imgur.com/bU6qZlD.png)

### X3 Java Edition pages
- **[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/x3-pixel-realism-64x)**
- **[Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/x3-pixel-realism-64x)**

Stay tuned for updates and follow my **[X.com account](https://x.com/EnderManBuild)**!

This is my solo project, so I'll glad if you consider to support me on my way!

Big thanks to Lexon and KriseHevette for contributing to the development.
